title: Decorsea meridionalis
taxonomy: Decorsea meridionalis is a species within the plant family Fabaceae, commonly known as legumes. The genus Decorsea is a group of flowering plants native to tropical Africa, with some species being classified within the subfamily Faboideae. It is likely to be closely related to other Fabaceae species, sharing characteristics such as compound leaves and small, pinkish flowers.
